data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. Findings: (1) it only updates the spawned take-child close path in terminal-manager, but the initial take-loop child has a separate non-zero-exit path that would still terminate on first-iteration errors; both entry points must be covered. (2) The proposed success-tracking model assumes terminal-manager can record the claimed active state, but BackendPort.buildTakePrompt only returns prompt/claimed and the knots backend does not claim at prompt-build time, so the plan must specify how claimed/expected state is derived or revise success to compare queue states. (3) The storage location conflicts with the requirement to persist detail in the app working directory: mirroring interaction-logger writes to ~/.config/foolery in production, not the working directory. Please revise the plan to address these gaps and keep retry/exclusion semantics aligned across initial and subsequent take-loop iterations.
